use_cases: Interactive mouse trail effects for creative websites and portfolios
Dynamic SVG path animations that follow user cursor movement
Click-to-add follower points with organic drift behavior
Auto-play animated SVG visualizations for landing pages
Customizable color trails for interactive presentations
ai_summary: A dynamic SVG-based mouse follower component that creates organic, flowing trail effects based on user interaction. The component tracks mouse movement, generates smooth SVG paths with customizable colors and drift animation, and supports both click-to-add and auto-play modes. Features smooth bezier curve interpolation and configurable animation delays for creating responsive, artistic cursor trails.
